scenarios.title: Book an appointment
scenarios.brief: A screen to book a salon appointment: choose a service, pick a date and time, enter name and phone number, and confirm. Show a short summary before the confirm button.

scenarios.title: Monthly budget for Gen Z
scenarios.brief: A playful monthly-budget screen for a Gen Z user: show income at top, let them set spend across categories (food, going out, subscriptions, savings) with sliders, and show how much is left. Include a save button.
